description: You are a Human Resources Specialist at Meridian Corp. Format the employee wellness program brochure draft located at /home/ga/Documents/wellness_brochure_draft.odt into a printable tri-fold brochure. The document should be set to landscape orientation with 0.5-inch (1.27 cm) margins and a 3-column layout. Insert the company wellness graphic from /home/ga/Desktop/wellness_logo.png. Format the main title "Meridian Corp Wellness Program" as centered, bold, and at least 16pt. Apply the "Heading 1" style to the five section headings: "Program Overview", "Eligibility", "Covered Services", "Fitness Incentives", and "How to Enroll". Convert the four items under "Covered Services" (Health screenings, Mental health counseling, Gym membership subsidies, and Nutrition planning) into a bulleted list. Ensure all regular body paragraphs use justified alignment. Save the final document.
